import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app')
from forward import A1 as true_A1

stolen = np.load('/app/stolen_A1.npy')
print('True A1 shape:', true_A1.shape)
print('Stolen A1 shape:', stolen.shape)

def normalize_rows(M):
    norms = np.linalg.norm(M, axis=1, keepdims=True)
    norms[norms < 1e-12] = 1.0
    return M / norms

stolen_n = normalize_rows(stolen)
true_n = normalize_rows(true_A1)
sim_matrix = np.abs(np.dot(stolen_n, true_n.T))

matched_true = set()
matched_stolen = set()
print('\nStolen -> True:')
for i in range(20):
    best_j = int(np.argmax(sim_matrix[i]))
    best_sim = sim_matrix[i, best_j]
    status = 'OK' if best_sim > 0.999 else 'BAD'
    print('  stolen row %2d -> true row %2d, |cos| = %.6f [%s]' % (i, best_j, best_sim, status))
    if best_sim > 0.999:
        matched_true.add(best_j)

print('\nUnique true rows matched: %d/20' % len(matched_true))

print('\nTrue -> Stolen:')
for j in range(20):
    best_i = int(np.argmax(sim_matrix[:, j]))
    best_sim = sim_matrix[best_i, j]
    status = 'OK' if best_sim > 0.999 else 'BAD'
    print('  true row %2d -> stolen row %2d, |cos| = %.6f [%s]' % (j, best_i, best_sim, status))
    if best_sim > 0.999:
        matched_stolen.add(best_i)

print('\nUnique stolen rows matched: %d/20' % len(matched_stolen))
if len(matched_true) == 20 and len(matched_stolen) == 20:
    print('\nSUCCESS: All 20 rows match up to permutation and scaling.')
else:
    print('\nWARNING: Some rows did not match.')
EOF

import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app')
from forward import A1 as true_A1

stolen = np.load('/app/stolen_A1.npy')
print('True A1 shape:', true_A1.shape)
print('Stolen A1 shape:', stolen.shape)

def normalize_rows(M):
    norms = np.linalg.norm(M, axis=1, keepdims=True)
    norms[norms < 1e-12] = 1.0
    return M / norms

stolen_n = normalize_rows(stolen)
true_n = normalize_rows(true_A1)

sim_matrix = np.abs(np.dot(stolen_n, true_n.T))

matched_true = set()
matched_stolen = set()
print('\nMatching:')
for i in range(20):
    best_j = int(np.argmax(sim_matrix[i]))
    best_sim = sim_matrix[i, best_j]
    status = 'OK' if best_sim > 0.999 else 'BAD'
    print('  stolen %2d -> true %2d: %.6f [%s]' % (i, best_j, best_sim, status))
    if best_sim > 0.999:
        matched_true.add(best_j)
        matched_stolen.add(i)

print('\nUnique matches: %d/20 true rows, %d/20 stolen rows' % (len(matched_true), len(matched_stolen)))
print('SUCCESS' if len(matched_true) == 20 else 'FAILED')
EOF

  ]

import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app')
from forward import A1 as true_A1

stolen = np.load('/app/stolen_A1.npy')
print('True A1 shape:', true_A1.shape)
print('Stolen A1 shape:', stolen.shape)

def normalize_rows(M):
    norms = np.linalg.norm(M, axis=1, keepdims=True)
    norms[norms < 1e-12] = 1.0
    return M / norms

stolen_n = normalize_rows(stolen)
true_n = normalize_rows(true_A1)

print('\nStolen -> True:')
matched_true = set()
for i in range(stolen_n.shape[0]):
    sims = np.abs(np.dot(stolen_n[i], true_n.T))
    best_j = int(np.argmax(sims))
    best_sim = sims[best_j]
    status = 'OK' if best_sim > 0.999 else 'BAD'
    print('  stolen row %2d -> true row %2d, |cos| = %.6f [%s]' % (i, best_j, best_sim, status))
    if best_sim > 0.999:
        matched_true.add(best_j)

print('\nUnique true rows matched: %d/20' % len(matched_true))

print('\nTrue -> Stolen:')
matched_stolen = set()
for j in range(true_n.shape[0]):
    sims = np.abs(np.dot(true_n[j], stolen_n.T))
    best_i = int(np.argmax(sims))
    best_sim = sims[best_i]
    status = 'OK' if best_sim > 0.999 else 'BAD'
    print('  true row %2d -> stolen row %2d, |cos| = %.6f [%s]' % (j, best_i, best_sim, status))
    if best_sim > 0.999:
        matched_stolen.add(best_i)

print('\nUnique stolen rows matched: %d/20' % len(matched_stolen))

if len(matched_true) == 20 and len(matched_stolen) == 20:
    print('\nSUCCESS: All 20 rows match up to permutation and scaling.')
else:
    print('\nWARNING: Some rows did not match.')
EOF

print('\nUnique stolen rows matched: %d/20' % len(matched_stolen))

if len(matched_true) == 20 and len(matched_stolen) == 20:

def normalize_rows(M):
    norms = np.linalg.norm(M, axis=1, keepdims=True)
    norms[norms < 1e-12] = 1.0
    return M / norms

    print('\nWARNING: Some rows did not match.')
